comments: End of year show highlighting the Gallup top 30 rock albums of the year. TV confirms the date by referring to a similar review of the UK Top 40 the following Tuesday: Radio Times lists that programme as going out on 31st December.
Not all albums have representative tracks played, presumably for reasons of time.
